nodes.name: Webhook Start (PORTO)
nodes.notes: Header X-PORTO-Token. Body JSON: { source, requestId, userEmail, userCaption, aspectRatio, firstFrame:{base64,mimeType}, lastFrame?:{base64,mimeType} }.

nodes.name: Veo predictLongRunning
nodes.notes: neverError + fullResponse: kita inspect status code & body sendiri di node berikutnya supaya error Vertex (4xx/5xx) tidak menggagalkan workflow dan tetap mengembalikan respons informatif ke caller.

nodes.name: Webhook Status (PORTO)
nodes.notes: Header X-PORTO-Token. Body JSON: { requestId, operationName }.
